ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the article was created */,
  "last_edited" TEXT /* Date the article was last edited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Approval status of the article (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the article */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the article */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_value" INTEGER /* Value of the vote (e.g., 1 for upvote, -1 for downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the vote has been deleted */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who voted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the comment has been deleted */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Software, Tips) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is the primary category for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_categories_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the tag is the primary tag for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the profile belongs */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's personal website */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON field to store links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "reputation_points" INTEGER /* Integer to store the user's reputation points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., comment, vote, approval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "settings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the settings record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the settings belong */,
  "receive_notifications" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the user wants to receive notifications */,
  "dark_mode" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the user prefers dark mode */,
  "email_preferences" TEXT /* JSON field to store email preferences (e.g., frequency, types of notifications) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_edits" (
  "edit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the edit record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being edited */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date when the edit was made */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the edit */,
  "edit_note" TEXT /* Notes about the edit */,
  "is_major_edit" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the edit is a major change */,
  "previous_version" TEXT /* JSON field to store the previous version of the article content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_edits_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_edits_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
